VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr5-aa-bridge.name: SR5 Automated Animations Bridge
VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr5-aa-bridge.hint: Triggers Automated Animations from Shadowrun 5 rolls and preserves AA automatic recognition settings.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr5-aa-bridge.description: Bridges Shadowrun 5 roll messages to AutomatedAnimations.playAnimation and protects autoanimations/aaAutorec from being lost between Foundry reloads.
